long_description:
Location: WDC07.STORAGE ROOM 02 (Upstairs B-LPR)
Affected IBM Cloud Racks or Rows location: (specific or "ALL") None
Affected IBM Cloud Racks or Rows type: None

Timeline:
9:58 AM EST - SBT on site detects leak in B-LPR.
9:59 AM EST - SBT escalates to leadership.
10:10 AM EST - SBT verifies no assets have been affected by leak.
10:50 AM EST - Sabey (landlord) personnel respond and are assessing.
current_status_next_steps: Next Steps: Sabey to provide update to IBM Facilities team.
comment_list:
[{"comment": "From Sabey:

"Hi Kevin, 

There was a small silicon bead located on the roof that had broken free from the piping penetration that it was covering. Unlike the previous issue that was due to a design issue, this is a one-off occurrence. This has been corrected and new silicon has been installed. "", "added_by": "kevryan@us.ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-03T19:20:33Z"}, {"comment": "PagerDuty: Q3Z24HH3RWSVV7/DCOPS - SEV1 TEST was assigned to .", "added_by": "snowdev@us.ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-02T17:07:42Z"}, {"comment": "PagerDuty: Q3Z24HH3RWSVV7/DCOPS - SEV1 TEST was assigned to .", "added_by": "snowdev@us.ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-02T16:52:40Z"}, {"comment": "PagerDuty created incident(Q3Z24HH3RWSVV7)", "added_by": "system", "added_on": "2025-12-02T16:52:39Z"}]
